description: Product Description Lito Angels Baby Girls Flower Girl Bridesmaid Lace Dress with Headband! Sweet lace embroideries dress bring plenty of flair and flare! Comes with a cute bowknot headband for a delighted look! Design Details of Festival Party Ball Gown Baby Girls Dresses! Elegant puffy skirt comprised of 3 layers. Tulle layer on the top, with delicate floral embroideries at hemline; satin skirt at the middle; Features a detachable big bowknot with shiny diamante at back to add a touch of stunning finish to the dress. Fancy Baby Girl Occasion Party Dress with Elegant Design for Any Event! Pull on style with concealed zipper closure at back for easy dressing. Made of polyester and viscose fabric. Comfortable and breathable materials for all day wearing. Pretty Princess Dress for Wedding, Birthday, Christmas and Festival Parties! Perfect for many special occasions! Wedding flower girl bridesmaid dress, birthday party princess gown, pageant outfit, Christening, Baptism, church, formal ceremony, carnival, Christmas gala, new year eve, prom, fancy photo shooting, family gathering, children's day, Halloween dress up etc. Size Chart: NOTE: Please measure the actual body size and refer to the size chart to choose a proper size for best fit. There may be minor size difference. Please allow 1-2cm deviation. Product color may slightly vary due to the lighting of photo shooting or settings of display monitor.
